lore.english:
Taimanin. A graduate of Gosha Academy who fights at the front lines. A woman with an elegant and soft aura. A colleague and friend of the Storm Fan, Mitsuki Hoshino, with whom she has completed numerous missions. She's often treated like a child due to her small physique, and she seems to be bothered by it.

Light Art user. Wields a spear made of a special alloy as a weapon. If the weapon isn't used as a catalyst, the ninja art cannot be used properly. Her skill, "Rending Radiance", loads up her weapon and shoots light particles stored in its magazine. By adjusting her weapon, she can choose to fire either an ultra-thick or diffuse laser.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Light Lance Pierce[-]
skills.description:
Pierces the enemy with a spear, attacking the target 2 times.
Increases the turn of a [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff] by [V2:1190102] turn(s) at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1190102]%[-] chance on every attack.
skills.description_readable:
Pierces the enemy with a spear, attacking the target 2 times.
Increases the turn of a [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff] by [V2:1190102] turn(s) at a [R:1190102]% chance on every attack.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Light Art: Flash Cannon[-]
skills.description:
Fires a beam of light towards the enemy, attacking 4 times.
If the target has 2 or more [&DeBuff]s, each attack fills [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1190202]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1190202]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Fires a beam of light towards the enemy, attacking 4 times.
If the target has 2 or more [&DeBuff]s, each attack fills [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by ([V3:1190202]%) at a [R:1190202]% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Light Art: Rending Radiance[-]
skills.description:
Gathers particles of light at the tip of the spear and radiates them towards [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
The emitted light deals damage [A:11903] times, and reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of the 3rd skill of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] except the character by 1 turn on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
Gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1190302]%)[-] [&AccUp] [&Buff] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1190302] turn(s)
